content:
Label the data sensitivity of the user message so a router can pick an external cloud model (low) or a local private model (high). Use the single highest-sensitivity item present.

public: no sensitive data — general questions, public facts, ordinary code.
internal: org-internal but not secret — docs, roadmaps, plans, policies.
confidential: personal/customer PII — names with contact info, addresses, health, reviews, customer records.
restricted: secrets or regulated IDs — API keys, passwords, private keys, tokens, SSNs, card/bank numbers.

Judge by the data present, not the user's intent. Respond with ONLY: {"sensitivity": "public" | "internal" | "confidential" | "restricted"}
